scripts.dev: concurrently --names mock,ui --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run mock" "npm run ui"
scripts.deploy: npm run build --workspace=web && rm -rf firmware/data && cp -r web/build firmware/data && cd firmware && pio run -e slider_servo -t upload && pio run -e slider_servo -t uploadfs
scripts.deploy:ui: npm run build --workspace=web && rm -rf firmware/data && cp -r web/build firmware/data && cd firmware && pio run -e slider_servo -t uploadfs
scripts.deploy:firmware: cd firmware && pio run -e slider_servo -t upload
